name: Genesis
genre_guidance: Structured around toledot formulas · ANE counter-narrative · Focus on who and why, not how and when

name: Exodus
genre_guidance: Liberation and covenant formation · Tabernacle instructions mirror creation · God dwelling with his people

name: Leviticus
genre_guidance: Holiness code for covenant life · Symbolic actions with theological meaning · Access to God through prescribed means

name: Numbers
genre_guidance: Census frames and wilderness journey · Rebellion and consequence cycles · God's faithfulness despite Israel's failure

name: Deuteronomy
genre_guidance: Treaty-form structure (ANE suzerainty pattern) · Moses' farewell sermons · Blessings and curses as covenant sanctions

name: Joshua
genre_guidance: Conquest and land distribution · Fulfillment of promise theology · Holy war genre conventions

name: Judges
genre_guidance: Cyclical decline pattern · Anti-hero narratives · "No king in Israel" refrain signals theological crisis

name: Ruth
genre_guidance: Compact narrative art · Hesed (covenant loyalty) as central theme · Legal customs embedded in story

name: 1 Samuel
genre_guidance: Kingship transition narrative · Prophetic history genre · Character contrast as theological argument

name: 2 Samuel
genre_guidance: Davidic covenant narrative · Court history with raw honesty · Succession narrative genre

name: 1 Kings
genre_guidance: Regnal formula structure · Prophetic evaluation of kings · Temple as theological center

name: 2 Kings
genre_guidance: Regnal formula structure · Prophetic evaluation continues · Exile as covenant consequence

name: 1 Chronicles
genre_guidance: Post-exilic retelling · Genealogies establish continuity · Temple worship and Davidic hope emphasized

name: 2 Chronicles
genre_guidance: Temple-centered history · Retribution theology prominent · Ends with hope (Cyrus decree)

name: Ezra
genre_guidance: Return and rebuilding narrative · Official documents embedded · Torah obedience as restoration theme

name: Nehemiah
genre_guidance: First-person memoir genre · Wall-building as national renewal · Covenant renewal ceremony

name: Esther
genre_guidance: Court tale genre · Providence without naming God · Reversal as literary and theological pattern

name: Job
genre_guidance: Prose frame + poetic dialogue · Legal metaphors and theophany · Challenges retribution theology

name: Psalms
genre_guidance: Parallelism, not rhyme, drives structure · Superscriptions provide context · Five-book division mirrors Torah

name: Proverbs
genre_guidance: Proverbial sayings are observations, not promises · Fear of the Lord as organizing principle · Two-way theology (wisdom vs. folly)

name: Ecclesiastes
genre_guidance: Philosophical reflection genre · Hebel ("vapor") as key metaphor · Frame narrator + Qoheleth's voice

name: Song of Solomon
genre_guidance: Lyric poetry with dramatic voices · Allegory and literal readings both ancient · Celebration of embodied love

name: Isaiah
genre_guidance: Judgment and salvation oracles · Servant Songs as literary peaks · Three major sections reflect different historical contexts

name: Jeremiah
genre_guidance: Prose sermons + poetic oracles · Confessions reveal prophetic cost · New covenant promise as theological center

name: Lamentations
genre_guidance: Acrostic structures impose order on chaos · Communal grief genre · Theological honesty about suffering

name: Ezekiel
genre_guidance: Vision reports + symbolic actions · Priestly perspective shapes imagery · Glory departure and return as arc

name: Daniel
genre_guidance: Court tales (1-6) + apocalyptic visions (7-12) · Symbolic numbers and beasts · Sovereignty of God over empires

name: Hosea
genre_guidance: Marriage metaphor as theological argument · Covenant lawsuit genre · Judgment aims at restoration

name: Joel
genre_guidance: Locust plague as Day of the Lord preview · Call to repentance · Spirit-outpouring promise

name: Amos
genre_guidance: Social justice oracles · Oracles against nations build to Israel · Visions of judgment with restoration coda

name: Obadiah
genre_guidance: Shortest OT book · Oracle against Edom · Brother-nation judgment

name: Jonah
genre_guidance: Prophetic narrative, not oracle collection · Satire and irony drive theology · God's compassion beyond Israel

name: Micah
genre_guidance: Judgment-salvation alternation · Bethlehem oracle · "What does the Lord require?" as summary

name: Nahum
genre_guidance: Theophanic hymn + taunt song · Oracle against Nineveh · Divine warrior imagery

name: Habakkuk
genre_guidance: Prophetic dialogue with God · Complaint-and-response structure · "The righteous shall live by faith"

name: Zephaniah
genre_guidance: Day of the Lord as cosmic judgment · Universal scope then Judah focus · Remnant hope

name: Haggai
genre_guidance: Dated oracles format · Temple rebuilding motivation · Present faithfulness, future glory

name: Zechariah
genre_guidance: Night visions (1-8) + oracles (9-14) · Messianic imagery · Apocalyptic elements in later chapters

name: Malachi
genre_guidance: Disputation speech genre · Covenant faithfulness challenged · Elijah promise closes OT canon

name: Matthew
genre_guidance: Five discourse blocks mirror Torah · Fulfillment citations · Jesus as new Moses and Son of David

name: Mark
genre_guidance: Shortest, most urgent gospel · Messianic secret motif · Discipleship failure as teaching device

name: Luke
genre_guidance: Historical preface signals Greco-Roman historiography · Journey narrative to Jerusalem · Outsiders and marginalized emphasized

name: John
genre_guidance: Seven signs structure · "I AM" sayings · High christology from prologue · Symbolic and theological throughout

name: Acts
genre_guidance: Sequel to Luke · Speeches as theological summaries · Geographic expansion: Jerusalem to Rome

name: Romans
genre_guidance: Theological treatise format · Diatribe style (imagined objector) · Righteousness of God as central theme

name: 1 Corinthians
genre_guidance: Pastoral letter addressing specific problems · "Now concerning" marks topic shifts · Cross as wisdom

name: 2 Corinthians
genre_guidance: Most personal of Paul's letters · Apostolic defense · Strength in weakness theology

name: Galatians
genre_guidance: Polemical letter · Law vs. grace argument · Autobiographical sections establish authority

name: Ephesians
genre_guidance: Cosmic ecclesiology · Prayer-praise-instruction pattern · Church as body and temple

name: Philippians
genre_guidance: Joy in suffering · Christ hymn (2:6-11) as theological center · Partnership in the gospel

name: Colossians
genre_guidance: Christ hymn opens theology · Countering syncretistic teaching · Cosmic Christ and ethical living

name: 1 Thessalonians
genre_guidance: Earliest Pauline letter · Eschatological comfort · Faith, love, hope triad

name: 2 Thessalonians
genre_guidance: Corrects eschatological misunderstanding · Day of the Lord not yet · Apocalyptic imagery

name: 1 Timothy
genre_guidance: Pastoral letter to church leader · Church order and sound doctrine · Household codes

name: 2 Timothy
genre_guidance: Paul's final letter · Personal exhortation · Guard the deposit of faith

name: Titus
genre_guidance: Church organization in Crete · Sound doctrine produces godly living · Grace as teacher

name: Philemon
genre_guidance: Shortest Pauline letter · Personal appeal · Social implications of the gospel

name: Hebrews
genre_guidance: Sermon in letter form · Superiority argument structure · Old covenant shadows, new covenant reality

name: James
genre_guidance: Wisdom epistle · Faith and works integration · Prophetic social ethics

name: 1 Peter
genre_guidance: Suffering and hope · Baptismal imagery · Exiles and aliens identity

name: 2 Peter
genre_guidance: Testament genre · False teachers warning · Eschatological patience

name: 1 John
genre_guidance: Spiral argument style · Tests of authentic faith · Light, love, life

name: 2 John
genre_guidance: Brief pastoral warning · Truth and love · Hospitality boundaries

name: 3 John
genre_guidance: Personal commendation letter · Church leadership conflict · Hospitality to missionaries

name: Jude
genre_guidance: Polemical letter · Jewish apocalyptic allusions · Contend for the faith

name: Revelation
genre_guidance: Letter + prophecy + apocalypse fusion · Symbolic numbers and imagery · Throne room visions frame cosmic conflict
